lyrics:
Lyric DNYDK - STS (Something, There's Something)

Romanization

There's somethin', there's somethin'
That I haven't told you, my love
More important than anything
Can't no longer hold in my heart

You should've never expected
That I've been in this for so long
I was quite in my comfort zone
Knowin' that It could go wrong
Wrong wrong wrong WRONG

You've been all in my head
From the day we met together
Am I the one to forget
I'm reachin' on my own
I'm on a run again
Don't know the way to home
I'm just feelin' the raindrops
keep fallin' on my heart

On the way to my home
On our way to our home
On our way to our home
I'm just feelin' the raindrops
keep fallin' on my heart
On our way to our home

Hangeul

There's somethin', there's somethin'
That I haven't told you, my love
More important than anything
Can't no longer hold in my heart

You should've never expected
That I've been in this for so long
I was quite in my comfort zone
Knowin' that It could go wrong
Wrong wrong wrong WRONG

You've been all in my head
From the day we met together
Am I the one to forget
I'm reachin' on my own
I'm on a run again
Don't know the way to home
I'm just feelin' the raindrops
keep fallin' on my heart

On the way to my home
On our way to our home
On our way to our home
I'm just feelin' the raindrops
keep fallin' on my heart
On our way to our home

Lyric DNYDK - Sky is the limit

Romanization

They say sky is the limit but
Why do I see it so closely?
I wanna fly out to the universe
Where the stars will dry out my tears

Let me be free
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from all my pain
(you gotta let me be let go)
Free from all my past
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from you again
(you gotta let me be let go)

Free from all the pain
Free from all my past
Free from you again

At times I dream about the universe
If the milkyway was my dessert
I do.. cuddle me lettin' me feel fine
Finally memories of mine
Thought that was from nowhere
Now I'm feelin' that I've always belonged here
When I come back to realize that
The sky over is gray
Give a rocketship to fly me through
God, give me wings to flutter
Even if It burns I'll do.
Lemme fly out further
Give me pain
Give me rain
Give me bravery to get over them
Let me be free off the wall

Let me be free
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from all my pain
(you gotta let me be let go)
Free from all my past
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from you again
(you gotta let me be let go)

Free from all the pain
Free from all my past
Free from you again

Sometimes I feel like a great wall's
Right in front of me saying that
'stay where you are'
Or like 'what you have right now is the lot'
Then what I always had to say was that
Sky is the limit not you, mister great wall
But soon did I realize that sky ain't enough
I wanna go out to the universe
Ain't nobody stop me
through the way to the stars
I always wanted to be free

Hangeul

They say sky is the limit but
Why do I see it so closely?
I wanna fly out to the universe
Where the stars will dry out my tears

Let me be free
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from all my pain
(you gotta let me be let go)
Free from all my past
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from you again
(you gotta let me be let go)

Free from all the pain
Free from all my past
Free from you again

At times I dream about the universe
If the milkyway was my dessert
I do.. cuddle me lettin' me feel fine
Finally memories of mine
Thought that was from nowhere
Now I'm feelin' that I've always belonged here
When I come back to realize that
The sky over is gray
Give a rocketship to fly me through
God, give me wings to flutter
Even if It burns I'll do.
Lemme fly out further
Give me pain
Give me rain
Give me bravery to get over them
Let me be free off the wall

Let me be free
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from all my pain
(you gotta let me be let go)
Free from all my past
(you gotta let go you gotta let me be)
Free from you again
(you gotta let me be let go)

Free from all the pain
Free from all my past
Free from you again

Sometimes I feel like a great wall's
Right in front of me saying that
'stay where you are'
Or like 'what you have right now is the lot'
Then what I always had to say was that
Sky is the limit not you, mister great wall
But soon did I realize that sky ain't enough
I wanna go out to the universe
Ain't nobody stop me
through the way to the stars
I always wanted to be free

lyrics:
Lyric BEANSPROUT - 달달한 노래 (Sweet Song) (NONOL Live ver.)

Romanization

itjana han beonjjeum saenggakhae bwanni
neowa na namieotdamyeon
sasil nan saenggakhagido sireosseo
nae yeope eomneun neoui du son

ne apeseo daldalhan mareul hambeon haebogo sipeosseo

Hangeul

있잖아 한 번쯤 생각해 봤니
너와 나 남이었다면

내 옆에 없는 너의 두 손

네 앞에서 달달한 말을 한번 해보고 싶었어
오글거리지만 두 손발 꼭 잡고 들어 줄 수 있겠니

살짝 다가가서 네 입술에 나를 포개어줄게

어떻게 이렇게 너는 왜
바라만 보기만 해도 좋니
사랑해 좋아해 어떤 표현도 널 대신할 수 없어

부끄럽겠지만 두 눈을 꼭 감고 들어 줄 수 있겠니

사랑해 좋아해 어떤 표현도 널 대신할 수 없어

이젠 할 수 있어
네가 지겹도록 사랑을 속삭일게 Oh-

Lyric TAEREEN - 제자리 별 (Orbiting Star)

Romanization

itjana naega ne jubyeoneseo sarajyeojulge
eokjiro mireonaeji anado dwae

oraen sigan jinaseo bichi da baraejyeodo dwae
gakkeumssik gieokhae jugiman hae

neoreul cheoeum bon geu bam
yunanhi gadeukhaetdeon shining star

mudae wi jomyeongcheoreom
neomaneul bichuneun gold moon

mul heureudeusi heulleogadeon sigani
seororeul wihan daneo han madi madiga
nae maeume kkeullyeowa bakhyeo

meongcheonghane jeogiseo jejariman doneun byeol
iksukhan moseube nareul doraboni mwoya
haneun jisi narang ttok dalma isseo

eogulhan maeume

neol meoreojige mandeureosseo

eokjiro mireonaeji anado dwae

oraen sigan jinaseo bichi da baraejyeodo dwae
gakkeumssik gieokhae jugiman hae

dari miwojineun bam

ijen ollyeoboji aneul geoya
jeo haneul wiro
jeo haneul wido

nega miwojineun bam

jigeum tonghajido aneul geoya
neoui wiro
geunyeoui wiro

Hangeul

있잖아 내가 네 주변에서 사라져줄게
억지로 밀어내지 않아도 돼

오랜 시간 지나서 빛이 다 바래져도 돼
가끔씩 기억해 주기만 해

너를 처음 본 그 밤
유난히 가득했던 shining star

무대 위 조명처럼
너만을 비추는 gold moon

물 흐르듯이 흘러가던 시간이
서로를 위한 단어 한 마디 마디가
내 마음에 끌려와 박혀

하늘을 보며 너를 떠올리던 밤
